---
title: "Welcome!"
project:
  preview:
    port: 4200
    host: 127.0.0.1
    browser: true
    watch-inputs: true
    navigate: true
---

Welcome to my website! Here, you can find information on my research projects, publications, and talks. Additionally, I share my thoughts on various topics in my [blog](posts.qmd). For students interested in working with me on theses or study projects, please refer to the information provided in [this link](students/general-info.qmd).

## NEWS



## Timeline



```{r, echo=FALSE}

library(cronologia)
library(readr)
timeline <- read_csv("resources/timeline.csv",
                     show_col_types = FALSE)
create_tml(df = timeline,
           smr = "smr",
           dsc = "dsc",
           smr_col = "smr_col",
           smr_bgcol = "smr_bgcol",
           open = TRUE)
```
